titleStmt.title: SII 9.610: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 610. (A.R. No. 21 of 1910.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE EAST OF THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT KUNTHURU, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 1467, Krōdhi, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 15 corresponding to A.D. 1544 August 3, Sunday (not verifiable). When the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nārayyarājayya of Nandiyāla (a feudatory of the Vijayanagara kings), was ruling over Hadināḍu-sīme, his agent Kampāraṇṇa is stated to have made a gift to Kempanañjēdēva, head of the Mahānandīśvara-maṭha. The gift was made for the merit of Timmarājayya, Nāriyapparājayya and Avubhaḷarājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyūdayaśālivāhanaśakava
ruṣa 1467 saṁdu varttamāna krōdhisaṁvatsarada srā
vaṇa śu 15 lū śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara naṁdiyāla
da nārayyarājayyagaḷu hadināḍasīmeya Āḷuttiru
lāgi Ā sīmeya kuṁtūra siṁhāsadalli Aramanege saṁ
baḷa sarati Āgi mūvattu varahanu tekoṁḍu baruttiralā
gi Ā kuṁtūra siṁhāsanada mahānaṁdīśvara siṁhāsana pu
ṇyakṣētradalli māḍida dharma Ā mahā naṁdīsvaramaṭada ma
hāmahāttinūḷagāda paṭṭada keṁpanaṁjēdēvarige
tiṁmarājayya nāriyapparājayya Aubhaḷarājayya
navarige puṇyavāgabēkeṁdu Avara kāryyakke kartta
rāda kaṁpārāṁṇnagaḷu sarvamānyavāgi koṭṭa dharmada
silāsādhana �yo dharmmavanū Āvanōrva Apaharisidare
Ātanu vāraṇāsiyalli kavileya koṁda pāpakke hōha
nu brāhmaṇahatyava māḍida pāpakke hōhanū . svadattaṁ
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattāpahā
rēṇa svadattaṁ ni(ḥ)ṣpalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ vā paradattāṁ vā(ṁ)
yō harēta vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvaruṣasahasrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē kri�mo . na viṣaṁ viṣamatyāhuḥ dēvasvaṁ viṣamu
cyatē viṣamēkākinaṁ haṁti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrakaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.610 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
